title: 🟣 Cantor Dust & Cantor Sets
name: 🟣 Cantor Dust & Cantor Sets
what_it_is: Infinitely fragmented structures made by removing middle portions—like a visual representation of infinite emptiness. Appears as scattered dust with no solid core.
how_to_use: her cloak is woven from Cantor dust—shimmering particles suspended in ordered void
the space dissolves into Cantor fractals—fragmented light and shadow in recursive intervals
animation_behavior: Particles blink in and out, recursive disintegration, flickering digital silence ---
